extName.description: Extension display name shown in Chrome Web Store and toolbar

extDescription.message: Protect your privacy on AI chatbots. Auto-masks personal data (PII) and detects prompt injection, jailbreak, and data extraction on ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and 25+ AI services. Silent by default — only alerts when it matters.
extDescription.description: Extension description for Chrome Web Store listing (max 132 chars for short desc)
